description_long: This is a medium-sized hardcover book with a rich, brown, textured cover that resembles leather. The front cover features a subtle, natural grain pattern and is adorned with gold-embossed script text. The book's edges are straight and crisp, with a visible gap between the covers indicating it is slightly open. The spine and back cover share the same brown, leather-like texture, but the back is plain with no visible markings or illustrations. The pages inside appear to be white or off-white, contrasting with the darker exterior.
description: A brown, leather-textured hardcover book with gold script on the front and plain back, slightly open to reveal white pages.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the white pages and the brown, textured cover edges.
description_view_1: A view of the plain back cover, displaying the brown, leather-like texture without any text or illustration.
description_view_2: The opposite narrow side view, again highlighting the white pages and brown cover edges.
description_view_3: The front cover view, featuring gold script text on a brown, leather-textured surface.
